channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-07-23)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-07-23.

item.title: [FREEBIE] [HOT] Fracture Sounds|Fracture Sounds has released Blueprint ? Textural Sax, a free library for Kontakt Player.!? NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Fracture Sounds - Finaliza: None

item.title: [FREEBIE] ZAK Sound|ZAK Sound has released RocketVerb plugin for Win, Mac & Linux. The plugin is available as a free download.!? NEW
[HOT] Soundtoys|Soundtoys Summer Sale – up to 65% off on selected plugins and bundles, 40% off on upgrades.!? NEW
